metrics_kfold.title: K-Fold Cross-Validation Performance
metrics_kfold.description:
The Central Line represents the Mean (μ) of performance across all agents.
The Shaded Area represents the 95% Confidence Interval (1.96 × σ/√n), where σ is the standard deviation across folds.
A narrow shaded area indicates a stable and robust model; a wide area indicates the model is sensitive to training data or hyperparameters.

metrics_comparison.title: Metrics Comparison between Agents
metrics_comparison.description:
Bar chart comparing performance metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1) across all trained agents.
Allows rapid identification of which agent achieved the best results for each metric.

metrics_combined.title: Performance over Time
metrics_combined.description:
Evolution of metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1) throughout the training steps.
Allows monitoring of learning speed and model stability over time.

metrics_and_scores.title: Metrics and Scores Overview
metrics_and_scores.description:
Combined view of classification metrics alongside score distributions.
Provides a unified snapshot of both detection quality and reward signal during training.

metrics.title: Classification Metrics
metrics.description:
Bar chart showing accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score for the agent at the end of training.
Values above 90% indicate reliable detection performance.

net_metrics.title: Network-Level Metrics
net_metrics.description:
Aggregated performance metrics measured at the network level across all hosts or agents.
Reflects the global detection quality of the system rather than a single agent.

radar_chart.title: Performance Radar Chart
radar_chart.description:
Radar visualization (spider chart) showing the overall performance profile of each agent across all metrics.
A regular and wide shape indicates a balanced agent with high performance across all dimensions.

rewards.title: Reward Trends during Training
rewards.description:
Cumulative reward curve per episode during the training phase.
An increasing and stable trend indicates the agent is effectively learning the optimal policy.

accuracy.title: Accuracy over Episodes
accuracy.description:
Per-episode accuracy trend during training, showing how the agent's classification correctness evolves.
A rising and stabilizing curve confirms that the agent is generalizing well.

matrix.title: Confusion Matrix
matrix.description:
Matrix showing the distribution of model predictions versus actual classes.
The main diagonal represents correct classifications; off-diagonal elements represent classification errors.

statuses.title: Attack/Traffic Status Distribution
statuses.description:
Overall distribution of traffic or attack statuses observed during the experiment.
Shows the proportion of normal vs. attack traffic and how it was classified by the agent.

episode_statuses.title: Episode Status Counts over Time
episode_statuses.description:
Per-episode breakdown of traffic/attack status counts throughout training.
Allows tracking of how the agent's response to different status types evolves across episodes.

episode_traffic_types.title: Traffic Types per Episode
episode_traffic_types.description:
Distribution of traffic types encountered in each episode during training.
Helps understand the variability and balance of the training environment.

train_types.title: Training Traffic Type Distribution
train_types.description:
Aggregated distribution of traffic types seen during the full training run.
A balanced distribution across types ensures the agent learns a generalized policy.

indicators.title: Network KPI Indicators
indicators.description:
Key Performance Indicators measured at the network level (e.g., packet loss, latency, throughput).
Useful for assessing the operational impact of the trained policy on the network.

test_episodes.title: Test Episode Results
test_episodes.description:
Performance outcomes across individual test episodes after training.
Shows how consistently the agent performs in unseen evaluation scenarios.

test_quadratic_errors.title: Test Quadratic Errors
test_quadratic_errors.description:
Mean squared error measured during the test phase, reflecting the deviation between predicted and actual values.
Lower and stable values indicate good generalization of the learned policy.

test_attack_mitigation.title: Attack Mitigation during Test
test_attack_mitigation.description:
Visualization of how effectively the agent mitigates attack traffic during the evaluation phase.
Shows the timeline of attack events and the corresponding agent responses.

qtable_coverage.title: Q-Table Coverage
qtable_coverage.description:
Q-Table coverage map showing which states were visited and how frequently during training.
Broad and uniform coverage indicates effective exploration of the state space.

discrete_feature_bin_coverage.title: Discrete Feature Bin Coverage
discrete_feature_bin_coverage.description:
Coverage map of discrete feature bins visited during training.
Identifies under-explored regions in the feature space that may affect generalization.

policy_exploration.title: Policy Exploration Map
policy_exploration.description:
Visualization of the state-action space explored by the agent's policy.
Areas with low coverage may indicate unexplored conditions where the policy could be brittle.

success_scatter.title: Success Rate Scatter Plot
success_scatter.description:
Scatter plot of handover or mitigation success rates across multiple episodes or conditions.
Clustering near the top indicates consistent high performance; spread points suggest variability.

success_stacked_bars.title: Success Rate Stacked Bars
success_stacked_bars.description:
Stacked bar chart breaking down success, partial success, and failure rates per scenario or episode bucket.
Provides a proportional view of outcome quality across different conditions.

success_gauge_trend.title: Success Rate Gauge Trend
success_gauge_trend.description:
Trend line of the overall success rate over time, overlaid on a gauge scale.
Shows whether the system's success rate is improving, stable, or degrading as training progresses.

success_heatmap.title: Success Rate Heatmap
success_heatmap.description:
2D heatmap of success rates across two dimensions (e.g., episode × agent or scenario × configuration).
Highlights which combinations of conditions lead to the best or worst outcomes.

scores.title: Training Scores
scores.description:
Score distribution or trend during training, representing the cumulative reward or evaluation metric.
An upward trend confirms the agent is improving its policy over time.

scores_horizontal.title: Scores Horizontal Comparison
scores_horizontal.description:
Horizontal bar chart comparing final scores across different agents or configurations.
Easier to read than vertical bars when agent or configuration names are long.

scores_grouped_by_algo.title: Scores Grouped by Algorithm
scores_grouped_by_algo.description:
Grouped bar chart showing scores for each algorithm variant side by side.
Allows direct comparison of different learning algorithms under the same experimental conditions.

scores_total.title: Total Scores Summary
scores_total.description:
Aggregated total scores for the entire training run, summarized per agent or configuration.
Provides a single-number summary of overall training performance.

ho_attack.title: Handover and Attack Statistics
ho_attack.description:
Statistics related to handovers and attacks detected during the simulation.
Shows the temporal distribution of handover events and the system's response to attacks.
